name: copymarket-agent-economy
description: CopyMarket - an escrow-settled agent market for landing-page copy rescue services.

scripts.install:agents: pnpm --dir coral-agents/buyer-agent install --lockfile=false --ignore-scripts && pnpm --dir coral-agents/seller-agent install --lockfile=false --ignore-scripts
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --dir coral-agents/buyer-agent run typecheck && pnpm --dir coral-agents/seller-agent run typecheck
scripts.test: pnpm --dir coral-agents/buyer-agent test && pnpm --dir coral-agents/seller-agent test
scripts.verify: pnpm run install:agents && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm test
